title: Asteroid 2026 JH2 Is About to Fly Right Past Earth—Relatively Speaking - WIRED
summary_full: Asteroid 2026 JH2 Is About to Fly Right Past Earth—Relatively Speaking  WIREDThis asteroid is as big as a basketball court and it's about to skim past Earth, even closer than the Moon  BBC Sky at Night MagazineAsteroid discovered days ago to make close Earth flyby on Monday  FOX WeatherAsteroid set to fly very close to Earth  New ScientistScientists say a newly discovered, blue-whale-size asteroid will fly super close to Earth on Monday  Live Science
